project_privacy_data_flows.data_type: External Content (Text, Images, Videos, Files from other apps)
project_privacy_data_flows.description: App registers as share target to receive content from other Android apps. Received content saved as new note or attachment via encrypted storage.

flow_steps.code: <activity android:name=".ShareActivity" ...> <intent-filter android:label="Make Note"> <action android:name="android.intent.action.SEND" /> <data android:mimeType="text/*" /> <data android:mimeType="image/*" /> <data android:mimeType="video/*" /> <data android:mimeType="application/*" /> </intent-filter>
flow_steps.details: App registers for ACTION_SEND, ACTION_SEND_MULTIPLE, and ACTION_PROCESS_TEXT intents. Accepts text, images, videos, and application files.
ShareActivity launches React Native component (NotesnookShare) to process incoming shared content.

flow_steps.code: public WritableMap getIntent() { ... Intent intent = getCurrentActivity().getIntent(); Bundle extras = getCurrentActivity().getIntent().getExtras(); ... }
flow_steps.details: Shared data (text, image URIs, etc.) extracted from Intent extras and passed to React Native via native bridge.
App also handles deep links (https://app.notesnook.com, notesnook://, nn://) to open specific notes, notebooks, or tags.

flow_steps.code: const id = await db.notes?.add({ content: { type: "tiptap", data: textToHTML(input as string) } });
flow_steps.details: Received content saved as encrypted note in local database.
